message:
feat(web): add OpenGraph images and metadata for user profiles

- Add opengraph-image.tsx for dynamic OG images at /user/[username]
- Add openGraph and twitter card metadata in generateMetadata
- Fix admin layout async headers() call (Next.js 15+ compatibility)
- Add admin permissions helper for role-based access control
- Improve admin API routes with proper async context handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
